title: In cycle.ts, add programmatic hands-off violation check after diff capture — compare changed files against hands_off patterns using matchesHandsOff from safety.ts. If any violations found, skip reviewer and set outcome to verification_failed with the violation list. Saves an API call.
In cycle.ts, add empty-diff detection for the verification gate too — if diff is empty, skip verification (not just reviewer). Currently we skip reviewer but still run bun test on unchanged code.
Add a generalstaff init command to cli.ts that takes a project path, creates state/<id>/ with MISSION.md template and empty tasks.json, and prints a projects.yaml snippet the user can paste in

In projects.ts, validate that project path exists on disk and is a git repo (git rev-parse --git-dir) during loadProjectsYaml — emit a clear warning but don't fail, so projects.yaml can be portable across machines

Add a generalstaff history command to cli.ts that shows a compact table of recent cycles across all projects: cycle_id (truncated), project, outcome, duration, and SHA range — pulled from PROGRESS.jsonl
